Your neighbourhood coffee shop
in Queen's Park

Open seven days a week · College Parade, NW6

View Our Menu Find Us
Scroll

Queen's Park, London

A small shop,
a big welcome.

We're an independent speciality coffee shop on College Parade, serving carefully sourced beans alongside fresh pastries — seven days a week. We keep it simple: great coffee, good food, and a space where you can always pull up a chair.

Whether you're a regular or walking in for the first time, you'll always get the same careful cup.

Our Story

When we're open

Opening Hours

We're open every day of the week. Come in early for your morning espresso, or drop by on a slow weekend afternoon.

  • Monday 7 am – 7 pm
  • Tuesday 7 am – 7 pm
  • Wednesday 7 am – 7 pm
  • Thursday 7 am – 7 pm
  • Friday 7 am – 7 pm
  • Saturday 9 am – 7 pm
  • Sunday 9 am – 7 pm

On Instagram

@kayancoffeelondon

Follow along for daily coffee, pastry shots, and the occasional behind-the-scenes from our little corner of Queen's Park.
